Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need understand patterns across cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In all cases OR then MS then QS then some assembly and quality behavior then testing then packaging then optional labeling then DP then D

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Cases with TST and RT show TST RT TST and TST RT TST RT TST while other cases show only TST

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: testing loop do TST then either pass and exit or fail and do RT then back to TST thats exactly loop TST RT

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: LB appears in some cases and is skipped in case 2

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Labeling is choice LB or skip so use XOR between LB and silent transition

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 4 has AS then direct TST with no IQC while other cases include IQC and repeated AS

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: the loop for IQC and AS might be simple loop IQC AS or AS IQC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: loop AS IQC perfectly explains cases 1 2 4 5 but not case 3 with consecutive IQC

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: the only issue is case 3 with consecutive IQC so simple loop AS IQC fails for case 3

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: nested loop model works outer loop AS with inner loop IQC repeated by silent transition

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This yields AS IQC IQC AS IQC AS for case 3 and also matches case 1 case 5 and case 4

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: overall process is OR to MS to QS to loop assembly quality to loop testing to PK to optional labeling to DP to D

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus this model captures all cases
